overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an elevated neon-lit walkway in Night City. The player moves past a large cyberpunk statue, through an indoor food court, and takes an elevator down to street level. The scene features vibrant cyan and magenta neon lighting mixed with natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated neon walkway with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, observing the cyberpunk cityscape and large statue through the window

notable_agents.action: red monorail train passing by on the elevated track outside the window

entered.detail: massive bronze-colored statue of a figure holding a sword visible through the window
cyan neon light strips lining the ceiling and walls of the walkway
futuristic high-rise buildings with glass facades and neon advertisements
grated metal flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated walkway lined with cyan neon lights. A massive cyberpunk statue is visible through the window on the left, while a red monorail train passes by outside. The city skyline stretches into the distance under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food court with red ambient lighting

events.description: enters indoor food court area from the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the food court area, passing by seating and vending machines

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table near the window looking out at the city

entered.detail: long counter with green stools and bright overhead lighting
green-lit vending machine with digital display
large illuminated advertisement showing a vehicle

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an indoor food court bathed in red ambient light. The camera passes green vending machines and a food counter with stools, while an NPC sits at a table near the windows. The space is enclosed with metal beams and illuminated signage.

events.description: bright sunlight streams in through the large window overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: approaching the overlook area to view the statue and cityscape

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing at the railing looking out at the statue

entered.detail: the massive statue now viewed from behind, silhouetted against the bright sunlight
large panoramic window offering view of the city and statue

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the food court into a sunlit overlook area. Two NPCs stand at the railing gazing at the massive cyberpunk statue visible through the large window, with the city skyline glowing in the bright morning sunlight.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, observing the neon-lit street level below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: bright pink and cyan neon signs advertising various products on the buildings below
view of the street level below with crosswalks and parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: Moving along the walkway away from the statue overlook. The camera passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction and looks down at the neon-lit street level below, with bright pink and cyan advertisements visible on the surrounding buildings.

events.description: stops at elevator call panel and presses the button to call the elevator
enters the red-lit elevator car as the metal gate opens
elevator doors open to reveal the street level plaza below

agents.ego_description: waiting for and entering the elevator, descending to street level, then exiting into the plaza

entered.detail: digital panel displaying floor number 2 with call button
metal cage elevator with folding gate
small enclosed space with red walls and yellow control panel
open concrete area with stairs and graffiti on the walls at street level

segments.scene_description: Approaching the elevator at the end of the walkway. The player calls the elevator using the digital panel, enters the red-lit car with metal cage doors, and descends to the street level. The elevator doors open to reveal a lower plaza with concrete stairs and graffiti-covered walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a high-altitude neon walkway through a commercial hub and down to the gritty street level of Night City. It begins along an elevated path lined with cyan neon, passing a massive cyberpunk statue and a red monorail train set against a sunlit skyline. The camera then transitions into an indoor food court bathed in red ambient light, moving past green vending machines and seated NPCs before emerging back into a bright overlook area. As the view shifts away from the statue and toward the city below, the camera passes pedestrians and gazes down at the pink and cyan advertisements of the lower district. Finally, the movement leads to a digital elevator panel, descending through a red-lit metal cage to reveal a lower plaza characterized by concrete stairs and graffiti-covered walls.
